calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Authorizing Particular Transaction Transferring Assets To Petitioner; For Increase Of Petitioner'S Community Spouse Resource Allowa
Off Calendar Sep-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg and Will Doyle for and with Fred Auda (Petitioner).

The Court questions if this is being done for the purpose of preventing Medi-Cal from getting reimbursed for its services to the Wife. Mr. Doyle stated that the concern is qualifying for Medi-Cal, that the house is an exempt asset, that transfer of the property is necessary because when qualifying it is considered income, that there is the concern of doing an estate plan for both of them if the Wife dies soon and having to do probate would bear costs. The Court granted the Petition for Order Authorizing Particular Transaction Transferring Assets to Petitioner, etc.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Order Authorizing Particular Transaction Transferring Assets To Petitioner; For Increase Of Petitioner'S Community Spouse Resource Allowa
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
